errors.QUESTION_NOT_ACCEPTING_ANSWERS: This question is not accepting answers.
errors.INVALID_CATEGORY: The selected category does not exist.
errors.ANSWER_NOT_PENDING: Only pending answers can be approved.
errors.EXPIRES_AT_MUST_BE_FUTURE: Expiry date must be in the future.
errors.BLOCKED_WORD_DETECTED: Your answer contains language that is not allowed.
errors.INVALID_FEATURED_ANSWERS: One or more selected answers are invalid for this question.
errors.TOO_MANY_FEATURED_ANSWERS: You can select at most 3 featured answers.
errors.EMPTY_UPDATE_BODY: At least one field (text or status) is required.
errors.CANNOT_DELETE_ACTIVE_QUESTION: Cannot delete the active question. Archive it or publish a replacement first.
errors.CANNOT_ACTIVATE_EXPIRED: Cannot activate a question whose expiry date has passed.
